title: BABE STORE - 211info
text: ALLCARE HEALTH BROOKINGS OFFICE BABE STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF It is a rewards program where patients earn vouchers for healthy choices made, such as participating in classes and programs. Vouchers can be use at any of the Babe Stores to get items such as: baby clothing, blankets, sleepers, diapers, wipes, baby wash, infant bathtubs, washcloths, breast pads, nursing covers, nursing pillows, potty chairs, sippy cups, safetly latches and outlet protectors, and more. Eligibility: -Must be an AllCare CCO member to participate -Pregnant women and babies 0-3 years old Hours: Tuesday 12:30pm-4:30pm (541) 471-4106 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 471-4106 Maternal Child Care Team Language Access (888) 260-4287 Alternate (541) 734-5520 TTY/TTD 711 Toll-free (888) 460-0185 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties Services: Baby Clothing Diapers Home Safety Devices Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES INFORMATION SERVICES - NURSE HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
